creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
With default python3 version changed and default python version changed there are those failures (py-opencv may have been broken before):

http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101i386-default-PR205419-py3/2016-05-08_05h53m28s/logs/errors/py35-opencv-2.4.9_3.log
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101i386-default-PR205419-py3/2016-05-08_05h53m28s/logs/errors/convertall-0.6.0.log
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101i386-default-PR205419-py3/2016-05-08_05h53m28s/logs/errors/rpcalc-0.7.0_1.log

I can't test python kde4 ports as some dependencies fail to build with python3 (sysutils/qzeitgeist for instance)
